name: Fashion Wholesale Distributor
description: Mid-market fashion brand selling wholesale to boutiques and department stores. Seasonal collections, tiered pricing by buyer volume, Net-30 terms.
demo_talking_points: Seasonal catalog management with company-specific pricing
Net-30 terms with card-on-file for wholesale buyers
Draft orders for large custom requests
Mixed B2B + DTC operation on one storefront

name: Auto Parts Distributor
description: Aftermarket auto parts distributor selling to repair shops and dealerships. High order velocity, reorder-heavy, SKU-intensive catalog. B2B only.
demo_talking_points: High-frequency reorder workflows
Large company base with repeat purchasing
90% fulfillment rate — fast turnaround expectation
B2B-only operation, no consumer storefront

name: Specialty Food Wholesaler
description: Artisan food brand selling to restaurants, grocery chains, and specialty retailers. Perishable goods, minimum order quantities, urgent fulfillment.
demo_talking_points: Perishable fulfillment urgency — 85% fulfilled quickly
Restaurant vs retail buyer segments in catalogs
DTC-to-B2B expansion story
Minimum order quantity enforcement

name: Beauty & Cosmetics Brand
description: Premium beauty brand selling DTC and wholesale to salons and retailers. Heavy DTC presence, expanding into B2B. High draft order rate for custom salon bundles.
demo_talking_points: DTC-first brand expanding into wholesale
Draft orders for custom salon bundles (20%)
High DTC volume alongside smaller B2B operation
New company onboarding flow (30% new)

name: Electronics Components Supplier
description: B2B electronics component supplier serving manufacturers and assemblers. Technical SKUs, bulk orders, strict fulfillment SLAs. Pure B2B.
demo_talking_points: B2B-only technical distribution
95% fulfillment rate — strict SLA requirements
Large buyer base (30 companies)
Low draft order rate — standard reorder workflows

name: Furniture Manufacturer
description: Custom furniture manufacturer selling to interior designers, retailers, and hospitality. Long lead times, high draft order rate for custom specs. Made-to-order.
demo_talking_points: Long lead times — only 60% fulfilled (made-to-order)
High draft order rate (25%) for custom furniture specs
Designer and hospitality buyer segments
120-day order history for seasonal patterns

name: Home Decor & Kitchen Wholesale
description: Home goods brand selling kitchen and decor products to retailers, gift shops, and interior studios. Two product lines, broad buyer base, seasonal buying patterns.
demo_talking_points: Two product verticals — home decor + kitchen/dining
Diverse buyer types: retailers, gift shops, design studios
Seasonal buying patterns over 90-day history
Strong DTC + growing B2B hybrid model

name: Pet Supply Distributor
description: Pet food and supply distributor serving pet stores, vet clinics, and grooming salons. Subscription-like reorder patterns, compliance-sensitive products, diverse buyer types.
demo_talking_points: Subscription-like reorder patterns from repeat buyers
Diverse buyer types: pet stores, vet clinics, grooming salons
88% fulfillment — reliable distribution expected
DTC consumer channel alongside B2B distribution
